SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BreedDetailsDto
DTO representing detailed breed data returned by The Dog API.
BreedDetailsDto.ImageDto
 
BreedDetailsDto.MeasurementDto
 
BreedDetailsMapper
Maps Dog API breed detail responses into local BreedInfo entities.
BreedInfo
 
BreedInfoDao
DAO for querying and persisting BreedInfo rows.
BreedInfoRepository
Repository abstraction for app-level breed facts lookup and persistence.
BreedInfoRepositoryImpl
Room-backed implementation of BreedInfoRepository.
BreedMapping
Maps a TensorFlow model output label to a Dog API breed identifier.
BreedMappingDao
DAO for persisted model-label to Dog API breed-id mappings.
BreedMappingRepository
Repository abstraction for mapping model labels to Dog API breed ids.
BreedMappingRepositoryImpl
Room-backed implementation of BreedMappingRepository with asset seeding support.
BreedMappingSeedDto
DTO for one JSON seed row mapping a model label to a Dog API breed id.
BreedMappingSeedLoader
Loads initial breed mapping rows from bundled JSON seed data.
BreedPrediction
 
BreedPredictionDao
DAO for prediction rows generated from image scans.
BreedSearchResultDto
DTO representing one breed summary row from Dog API search responses.
CameraCaptureHelper
Utility methods for creating temporary files used by camera capture flows.
DatabaseModule
Hilt module providing Room database and DAO singletons.
DogApiModule
Hilt module providing configured Dog API networking dependencies.
DogApiService
Retrofit contract for The Dog API endpoints used by the app.
DogBreedInference
Runs TensorFlow Lite dog-breed inference for a source image and returns top predictions.
DogBreedInferenceResult
Immutable value object containing top dog-breed predictions for one analyzed image.
DogBreedPrediction
Immutable label/score pair representing one model prediction.
DoggoneItApplication
Initializes (in the DoggoneItApplication.onCreate() method) application-level resources that cannot be handled with Hilt dependency injection.
DoggoneItDatabase
Room database containing app entities for users, scans, predictions, and breed metadata.
DoggoneItDatabase.Converters
Type converters used by Room for unsupported storage types.
HomeFragment
Home screen fragment providing entry actions for camera capture, gallery analysis, and saved scan navigation.
ImageStorage
Persists selected/captured images into app-private storage for saved scans.
LoginFragment
Login screen fragment that initiates Google sign-in and routes authenticated users to home.
LoginViewModel
Coordinates Google sign-in flows and local session state for login/logout UI.
MainActivity
Hosts the app navigation graph, app bar, and bottom navigation actions for camera/gallery capture and top-level destinations.
RepositoryModule
Hilt bindings from repository interfaces to concrete implementations.
SavedScanGridAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for the saved-scans gallery grid.
SavedScanGridAdapter.ScanClickListener
Callback contract for gallery tile selection.
Scan
 
ScanAnalysisFragment
Screen that runs local image inference, presents ranked predictions, and saves selected scans.
ScanDao
DAO for scan records and related projection queries used by gallery and detail screens.
ScanDisplayFragment
Detail screen for one saved scan, including selected breed summary, facts, and notes.
ScanDisplayViewModel
ViewModel for saved-scan detail UI state, including facts loading, favorites, and notes.
ScanDisplayViewModel.ContentTab
 
ScanDisplayViewModel.FactsState
 
ScanDisplayViewModel.FactsStatus
 
ScanDisplayViewModel.NotesMode
 
ScanDisplayViewModel.UiMessage
 
ScanDisplayViewModel.UiState
 
ScanGalleryItem
Projection model for one tile in the saved-scans gallery.
ScanPredictionAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying and selecting top breed predictions.
ScanPredictionAdapter.OnPredictionSelectedListener
Callback contract for prediction selection.
ScanPredictionAdapter.ScanPredictionItem
 
ScanRepository
Repository abstraction for saved scans, predictions, and gallery projections.
ScanRepositoryImpl
Room-backed implementation of ScanRepository.
ScansGalleryFragment
Gallery screen showing saved scans with user-controlled sorting and filtering.
ScansGalleryViewModel
ViewModel providing filtered/sorted gallery items for the saved scans screen.
ScansGalleryViewModel.SortDirection
 
ScansGalleryViewModel.SortField
 
ScanWithPredictions
Room relation projection combining a saved scan with its prediction rows.
SettingsFragment
Settings screen for authentication actions and default gallery presentation preferences.
SimpleItemSelectedListener
Thin spinner/item-selection listener that forwards selected position to a callback.
SimpleItemSelectedListener.SelectionConsumer
Callback contract for selection events.
UserProfile
Entity representing a user profile in the Doggone It application.
UserProfileDao
DAO for user profile persistence and lookup by email.
UserProfileRepository
Repository abstraction for user profile CRUD operations.
UserProfileRepositoryImpl
Room-backed implementation of UserProfileRepository.
UserSessionRepository
Tracks authenticated session state and current local user profile.
UserSessionRepositoryImpl
In-memory session manager backed by UserProfileDao for profile lookup/creation.
